draft.title: Draft

draft.clickPathsToExpand: Click paths to expand. Section clicks highlight & scroll editor to marker.

landing.headline: Indian legal drafts. Grounded in real law.
landing.subheadline: RTI applications · Legal notices · NDAs · Consumer complaints · Cheque-bounce notices
landing.feature1: Cites every claim to a real section of an Indian Act
landing.feature2: Available in English, Hindi, Gujarati, Marathi, Tamil

auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

dashboard.title: Your drafts

dashboard.emptyState: No drafts yet — start one with [+ New draft]
dashboard.emptyStateDesc: You haven't created any legal documents yet. Start drafting now.
dashboard.empty: No drafts yet — start one with [+ New draft]

intake.title: New draft
intake.docTypeQuestion: What kind of document do you need?
intake.docTypeOptionAi: Let our AI decide based on what you describe
intake.docTypeOptionAiDesc: Classifier routes to the correct legal domain automatically.
intake.docTypeOptionRtiDesc: Right to Information requests under Section 6 of RTI Act, 2005.
intake.docTypeOptionNoticeDesc: Demand letters, tenant deposit recoveries, contract notices.
intake.docTypeOptionConsumerDesc: Consumer Protection Act filings for deficient goods/services.
intake.docTypeOptionEmploymentDesc: Standard employment agreements under Indian Labour Laws.
intake.docTypeOptionChequeDesc: Formal demand under Section 138 of Negotiable Instruments Act.
intake.situationPlaceholder: Describe your issue in your own words. The more context, the better the draft. Names and identifying details stay on your device until you export.

errors.title: Error

documentDescriptions.rti: Right to Information request application under the RTI Act, 2005.
documentDescriptions.notice: Legal demand notice for Cheque Bounce, Tenant Deposit refund, or other matters.
documentDescriptions.nda: Non-Disclosure Agreement to protect confidential business information and trade secrets.
documentDescriptions.consumer: Complaint for deficiencies in goods or services before the Consumer Forum.
documentDescriptions.cheque: Statutory notice under Section 138 of the Negotiable Instruments Act for cheque dishonour.
documentDescriptions.general: General legal contract or agreement between two or more parties.
